forward_patch: --- original +++ modified @@ -0,0 +1,65 @@ +--- +assignees: +- claude-code +position_column: todo +position_ordinal: d080 +title: Extract DisplayText primitive from TextDisplay, use it in StatusDateDisplay for consistent text rendering +--- +## What + +StatusDateDisplay renders its own `` elements with inconsistent classes compared to TextDisplay — `text-xs text-muted-foreground` in compact mode (smaller and gray) vs TextDisplay's `truncate block` (inherited size/color), and vestigial `inline-flex items-center gap-*` wrappers in both modes left over from when the icon lived inside the display. + +Extract a shared `DisplayText` component from `text-display.tsx` that both `TextDisplay` and `StatusDateDisplay` delegate to for text rendering. This ensures all field text is consistent in sizing, color, and layout. + +### Approach + +**New component `DisplayText`** in `kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/displays/text-display.tsx`: + +```tsx +/** + * Shared text rendering primitive for field displays. + * + * Ensures consistent sizing, color, truncation, and empty-state rendering + * across all display components. Displays that compute a string value + * delegate here instead of rolling their own `` with ad-hoc classes. + */ +export function DisplayText({ text, mode, title }: { + text: string; + mode: \"compact\" | \"full\"; + title?: string; +}) { + if (!text) return -; + if (mode === \"compact\") return {text}; + return {text}; +} +``` + +Then `TextDisplay` becomes a thin wrapper: stringifies the value, delegates to `DisplayText`. And `StatusDateDisplay` computes its phrase, then renders `` — removing the `inline-flex` wrappers, `text-xs`, and `text-muted-foreground` classes entirely. + +### Files to modify + +1. **`kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/displays/text-display.tsx`** — Extract `DisplayText` component. Refactor `TextDisplay` to delegate to it. Export `DisplayText` alongside `TextDisplay` and `DisplayProps`. + +2. **`kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/displays/status-date-display.tsx`** — Import `DisplayText`. Replace the custom `` JSX in `StatusDateDisplay` with ``. Remove the `inline-flex items-center gap-*` wrappers from both compact and full modes. + +3. **`kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/displays/index.ts`** — Add `DisplayText` to the barrel export. + +## Acceptance Criteria + +- [ ] `DisplayText` is exported from `text-display.tsx` and `displays/index.ts` +- [ ] `TextDisplay` delegates to `DisplayText` — no duplication of span/class logic +- [ ] `StatusDateDisplay` uses `DisplayText` — no inline `text-xs`, `text-muted-foreground`, or `inline-flex` wrapper classes +- [ ] Status date text in compact mode matches TextDisplay compact: same font size (inherited, not `text-xs`), same color (inherited, not `text-muted-foreground`), same truncation behavior +- [ ] Status date text in full mode matches TextDisplay full: `text-sm`, no `inline-flex` wrapper +- [ ] The ISO timestamp `title` tooltip is preserved on StatusDateDisplay via `DisplayText`'s `title` prop +- [ ] Empty status date values still collapse (existing `isEmpty` predicate path unchanged) + +## Tests + +- [ ] **`kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/displays/text-display.test.tsx`** (new file) — Test `DisplayText` directly: empty text renders `-` with `text-muted-foreground/50`, compact mode renders with `truncate block`, full mode renders with `text-sm`, `title` prop is passed through as HTML attribute +- [ ] **`kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/displays/status-date-display.test.tsx`** — Update existing tests: assert no `text-xs` or `text-muted-foreground` classes in compact mode output, assert no `inline-flex` wrapper in either mode, verify `title` attribute still carries the ISO timestamp +- [ ] Run `cd kanban-app/ui && npx vitest run` — all tests pass + +## Workflow + +- Use `/tdd` — write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass. \ No newline at end of file
reverse_patch: --- original +++ modified @@ -1,65 +0,0 @@ ---- -assignees: -- claude-code -position_column: todo -position_ordinal: d080 -title: Extract DisplayText primitive from TextDisplay, use it in StatusDateDisplay for consistent text rendering ---- -## What - -StatusDateDisplay renders its own `` elements with inconsistent classes compared to TextDisplay — `text-xs text-muted-foreground` in compact mode (smaller and gray) vs TextDisplay's `truncate block` (inherited size/color), and vestigial `inline-flex items-center gap-*` wrappers in both modes left over from when the icon lived inside the display. - -Extract a shared `DisplayText` component from `text-display.tsx` that both `TextDisplay` and `StatusDateDisplay` delegate to for text rendering. This ensures all field text is consistent in sizing, color, and layout. - -### Approach - -**New component `DisplayText`** in `kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/displays/text-display.tsx`: - -```tsx -/** - * Shared text rendering primitive for field displays. - * - * Ensures consistent sizing, color, truncation, and empty-state rendering - * across all display components. Displays that compute a string value - * delegate here instead of rolling their own `` with ad-hoc classes. - */ -export function DisplayText({ text, mode, title }: { - text: string; - mode: \"compact\" | \"full\"; - title?: string; -}) { - if (!text) return -; - if (mode === \"compact\") return {text}; - return {text}; -} -``` - -Then `TextDisplay` becomes a thin wrapper: stringifies the value, delegates to `DisplayText`. And `StatusDateDisplay` computes its phrase, then renders `` — removing the `inline-flex` wrappers, `text-xs`, and `text-muted-foreground` classes entirely. - -### Files to modify - -1. **`kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/displays/text-display.tsx`** — Extract `DisplayText` component. Refactor `TextDisplay` to delegate to it. Export `DisplayText` alongside `TextDisplay` and `DisplayProps`. - -2. **`kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/displays/status-date-display.tsx`** — Import `DisplayText`. Replace the custom `` JSX in `StatusDateDisplay` with ``. Remove the `inline-flex items-center gap-*` wrappers from both compact and full modes. - -3. **`kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/displays/index.ts`** — Add `DisplayText` to the barrel export. - -## Acceptance Criteria - -- [ ] `DisplayText` is exported from `text-display.tsx` and `displays/index.ts` -- [ ] `TextDisplay` delegates to `DisplayText` — no duplication of span/class logic -- [ ] `StatusDateDisplay` uses `DisplayText` — no inline `text-xs`, `text-muted-foreground`, or `inline-flex` wrapper classes -- [ ] Status date text in compact mode matches TextDisplay compact: same font size (inherited, not `text-xs`), same color (inherited, not `text-muted-foreground`), same truncation behavior -- [ ] Status date text in full mode matches TextDisplay full: `text-sm`, no `inline-flex` wrapper -- [ ] The ISO timestamp `title` tooltip is preserved on StatusDateDisplay via `DisplayText`'s `title` prop -- [ ] Empty status date values still collapse (existing `isEmpty` predicate path unchanged) - -## Tests - -- [ ] **`kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/displays/text-display.test.tsx`** (new file) — Test `DisplayText` directly: empty text renders `-` with `text-muted-foreground/50`, compact mode renders with `truncate block`, full mode renders with `text-sm`, `title` prop is passed through as HTML attribute -- [ ] **`kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/displays/status-date-display.test.tsx`** — Update existing tests: assert no `text-xs` or `text-muted-foreground` classes in compact mode output, assert no `inline-flex` wrapper in either mode, verify `title` attribute still carries the ISO timestamp -- [ ] Run `cd kanban-app/ui && npx vitest run` — all tests pass - -## Workflow - -- Use `/tdd` — write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass. \ No newline at end of file

changes.value: ## What StatusDateDisplay renders its own `` elements with inconsistent classes compared to TextDisplay — `text-xs text-muted-foreground` in compact mode (smaller and gray) vs TextDisplay's `truncate block` (inherited size/color), and vestigial `inline-flex items-center gap-*` wrappers in both modes left over from when the icon lived inside the display. Extract a shared `DisplayText` component from `text-display.tsx` that both `TextDisplay` and `StatusDateDisplay` delegate to for text rendering. This ensures all field text is consistent in sizing, color, and layout. ### Approach **New component `DisplayText`** in `kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/displays/text-display.tsx`: ```tsx /** * Shared text rendering primitive for field displays. * * Ensures consistent sizing, color, truncation, and empty-state rendering * across all display components. Displays that compute a string value * delegate here instead of rolling their own `` with ad-hoc classes. */ export function DisplayText({ text, mode, title }: { text: string; mode: \"compact\" | \"full\"; title?: string; }) { if (!text) return -; if (mode === \"compact\") return {text}; return {text}; } ``` Then `TextDisplay` becomes a thin wrapper: stringifies the value, delegates to `DisplayText`. And `StatusDateDisplay` computes its phrase, then renders `` — removing the `inline-flex` wrappers, `text-xs`, and `text-muted-foreground` classes entirely. ### Files to modify 1. **`kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/displays/text-display.tsx`** — Extract `DisplayText` component. Refactor `TextDisplay` to delegate to it. Export `DisplayText` alongside `TextDisplay` and `DisplayProps`. 2. **`kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/displays/status-date-display.tsx`** — Import `DisplayText`. Replace the custom `` JSX in `StatusDateDisplay` with ``. Remove the `inline-flex items-center gap-*` wrappers from both compact and full modes. 3. **`kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/displays/index.ts`** — Add `DisplayText` to the barrel export. ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] `DisplayText` is exported from `text-display.tsx` and `displays/index.ts` - [ ] `TextDisplay` delegates to `DisplayText` — no duplication of span/class logic - [ ] `StatusDateDisplay` uses `DisplayText` — no inline `text-xs`, `text-muted-foreground`, or `inline-flex` wrapper classes - [ ] Status date text in compact mode matches TextDisplay compact: same font size (inherited, not `text-xs`), same color (inherited, not `text-muted-foreground`), same truncation behavior - [ ] Status date text in full mode matches TextDisplay full: `text-sm`, no `inline-flex` wrapper - [ ] The ISO timestamp `title` tooltip is preserved on StatusDateDisplay via `DisplayText`'s `title` prop - [ ] Empty status date values still collapse (existing `isEmpty` predicate path unchanged) ## Tests - [ ] **`kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/displays/text-display.test.tsx`** (new file) — Test `DisplayText` directly: empty text renders `-` with `text-muted-foreground/50`, compact mode renders with `truncate block`, full mode renders with `text-sm`, `title` prop is passed through as HTML attribute - [ ] **`kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/displays/status-date-display.test.tsx`** — Update existing tests: assert no `text-xs` or `text-muted-foreground` classes in compact mode output, assert no `inline-flex` wrapper in either mode, verify `title` attribute still carries the ISO timestamp - [ ] Run `cd kanban-app/ui && npx vitest run` — all tests pass ## Workflow - Use `/tdd` — write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.
Extract DisplayText primitive from TextDisplay, use it in StatusDateDisplay for consistent text rendering

 ## Acceptance Criteria

-- [ ] `DisplayText` is exported from `text-display.tsx` and `displays/index.ts`
-- [ ] `TextDisplay` delegates to `DisplayText` — no duplication of span/class logic
-- [ ] `StatusDateDisplay` uses `DisplayText` — no inline `text-xs`, `text-muted-foreground`, or `inline-flex` wrapper classes
-- [ ] Status date text in compact mode matches TextDisplay compact: same font size (inherited, not `text-xs`), same color (inherited, not `text-muted-foreground`), same truncation behavior
-- [ ] Status date text in full mode matches TextDisplay full: `text-sm`, no `inline-flex` wrapper
-- [ ] The ISO timestamp `title` tooltip is preserved on StatusDateDisplay via `DisplayText`'s `title` prop
-- [ ] Empty status date values still collapse (existing `isEmpty` predicate path unchanged)

+- [x] The ISO timestamp `title` tooltip is preserved on StatusDateDisplay via `DisplayText`'s `title` prop

 ## Tests

-- [ ] **`kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/displays/text-display.test.tsx`** (new file) — Test `DisplayText` directly: empty text renders `-` with `text-muted-foreground/50`, compact mode renders with `truncate block`, full mode renders with `text-sm`, `title` prop is passed through as HTML attribute
-- [ ] **`kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/displays/status-date-display.test.tsx`** — Update existing tests: assert no `text-xs` or `text-muted-foreground` classes in compact mode output, assert no `inline-flex` wrapper in either mode, verify `title` attribute still carries the ISO timestamp
-- [ ] Run `cd kanban-app/ui && npx vitest run` — all tests pass
+- [x] **`kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/displays/text-display.test.tsx`** (new file) — Test `DisplayText` directly: empty text renders `-` with `text-muted-foreground/50`, compact mode renders with `truncate block`, full mode renders with `text-sm`, `title` prop is passed through as HTML attribute

+- [x] Run `cd kanban-app/ui && npx vitest run` — all tests pass
